title: Walking on Sunshine (exemplar)
lyrics: I'm walking on sunshine and don't it feel good, the sky is bright, my heart is light, I feel so alive and free, everything is wonderful, smiling all day long

title: Hurt (exemplar)
lyrics: I hurt myself today, everyone I know goes away in the end, alone and empty, broken and lost, the pain stays and the tears keep falling down

title: Killing in the Name (exemplar)
lyrics: I won't do what you tell me, rage and fury, fight the power, burn it down, screaming against the machine, anger boiling over, never surrender

title: Mad World (exemplar)
lyrics: All around me are familiar faces, worn out places, the dreams in which I'm dying are the best I've ever had, a mad world, lonely and grey

title: Pumped Up Kicks (exemplar)
lyrics: All the other kids with the pumped up kicks better run, outrun my gun, faster than my bullet, danger hidden behind a cheerful melody

title: At Last (exemplar)
lyrics: At last my love has come along, my lonely days are over, you smiled and the spell was cast, here we are in heaven, warmth and tenderness forever

title: Somewhere Only We Know (exemplar)
lyrics: I walked across an empty land, I knew the pathway like the back of my hand, this could be the end of everything, so why don't we go somewhere only we know

title: Don't Stop Me Now (exemplar)
lyrics: Tonight I'm gonna have myself a real good time, I feel alive, I'm a shooting star leaping through the sky, two hundred degrees, having a ball, don't stop me now
